CustomField.formula: IF(DAY(DATEVALUE(StartDate)) < 10, '0' + TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(StartDate))), TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(StartDate)))) +'/'+ IF(MONTH(DATEVALUE(StartDate)) < 10, '0' + TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE(StartDate))), TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE(StartDate)))) +'/'+ TEXT(YEAR(DATEVALUE(StartDate)))
CustomField.label: Start Date Value
